SEARCH
Package model

Class Simulation

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Thread
model.Simulation
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable
public class Simulation extends Thread
Runs the discrete-event call-center simulation and coordinates all simulation phases, event queues, generated customers, UI updates, and persistence of performance results.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Thread

    Thread.State, Thread.UncaughtExceptionHandler

  • Field Details

    • delay

      public int delay

  • Constructor Details

    • Simulation

      public Simulation(Controller _controller, int _MAXTIME, int[] _rushHours)
      Creates a simulation thread.
      Parameters:
      _controller - UI controller to receive data and log updates, or null for headless execution
      _MAXTIME - maximum simulation time in minutes
      _rushHours - rush-hour start hours, where each value represents the first minute of a 60-minute rush period when multiplied by 60

  • Method Details

    • run

      public void run()
      Builds the service tree, generates customer arrivals, advances simulation phases until the configured maximum time, records UI metrics, and saves the final performance data.
      Specified by:
      run in interface Runnable
      Overrides:
      run in class Thread

    • scheduleB

      public void scheduleB(Event event)
      Schedules a start-service or end-service event.
      Parameters:
      event - event to normalize, enqueue, and expose to phase A

    • scheduleC

      public void scheduleC(Event event)
      Schedules a routing event.
      Parameters:
      event - event to normalize, enqueue, and expose to phase A

    • addDetails

      public void addDetails(String text)
      Writes a detail message to the UI when a controller is attached.
      Parameters:
      text - message to append to the simulation details view

    • getTime

      public int getTime()
      Gets the current simulation time.
      Returns:
      current time step in minutes

    • getServiceRoot

      public ServicePointTree getServiceRoot()
      Gets the root of the service-point tree.
      Returns:
      root service-point tree, or null before the simulation is started

    • recordCustomerResponseTime

      public void recordCustomerResponseTime(int responseTime)
      Records a completed customer's total response time.
      Parameters:
      responseTime - elapsed time from customer arrival to final service completion

    • getCustomersInSystem

      public int getCustomersInSystem()
      Counts customers currently being served or waiting in scheduled queues.
      Returns:
      number of customers still in the system

    • isRushHour

      public boolean isRushHour(int _time)
      Checks whether a simulation time falls within one of the configured rush hours.
      Parameters:
      _time - simulation time in minutes
      Returns:
      true when the time is in any configured rush-hour window; otherwise false

    • incDelay

      public void incDelay()
      Increases the UI animation delay by ten percent.

    • decDelay

      public void decDelay()
      Decreases the UI animation delay by ten percent.

    • setDelay

      public void setDelay(int _delay)
      Sets the UI animation delay between simulation ticks.
      Parameters:
      _delay - delay in milliseconds
